concerns.detail: Use of vulgar language '扯淡吧' (bullshit/nonsense) to dismiss the intern's testimony without substantive counter-evidence
Use of profanity '草' (fuck) in sarcastic comment attacking the intern's housing situation
concerns.excerpt: 草，原来耿哥拿我们的钱给你付房租去了

concerns.detail: Deletion of specific fraud accusation 'Paper造假' and replacement with claim it has been debunked, potentially suppressing substantive observation about the advisor
